violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized.PIC disposed of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

(Chicken Breast), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Working containers of (dry ingredients) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The cutting boards in the (back kitchen prep area ) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the (food storage area ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (throughout establishment) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked chicken and hotdogs) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (hood vents and food storage shelves in kitchen) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen near kettles) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The ceiling in the (front grill ) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The floors under serving line and ice machine area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (buffalo chopper) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitize. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

Utensils (spoons, tongs) in the salad bar area were stored in baskets with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
The blade to the food processor was in poor repair. Inspector observed chipping. Blade taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the sandwich prep unit and gaskets on several refrigeration units have an accumulation of dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

Air gap is missing at two (2) prep sinks on kitchen line. Per interview with PIC, only one sink is used for food prep and appropriate alternative methods are used to prevent contamination of food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
Openings observed to the walls of the storage room. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
